name: Pulse MANUAL -> set mode
Pulse AUTO -> set mode

format:
<style>
  /* ===== START / STOP (đặt className của ui_button = btn-start / btn-stop) ===== */
  .nr-dashboard-button.btn-start .md-button,
  .nr-dashboard-button.btn-start .md-button.md-raised {
    display: flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
    height: 48px !important;
    min-width: 128px !important;
    padding: 0 18px !important;

    background: #0E1216 !important;
    color: #2E7D32 !important;
    border: 2px solid #2E7D32 !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;

    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-size: 16px !important;
    letter-spacing: .3px !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-button.btn-start .md-button:hover {
    background: rgba(46, 125, 50, .12) !important;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-button.btn-stop .md-button,
  .nr-dashboard-button.btn-stop .md-button.md-raised {
    display: flex !important;
    align-items: center !important;
    justify-content: center !important;
    height: 48px !important;
    min-width: 128px !important;
    padding: 0 18px !important;

    background: #0E1216 !important;
    color: #E53935 !important;
    border: 2px solid #E53935 !important;
    border-radius: 12px !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;

    font-weight: 800 !important;
    font-size: 16px !important;
    letter-spacing: .3px !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-button.btn-stop .md-button:hover {
    background: rgba(229, 57, 53, .12) !important;
  }

  /* ===== Nút chuyển trạm: COMPACT (nhỏ hơn START/STOP) ===== */
  #btn-switch-hcm.md-button,
  #btn-switch-hcm.md-button.md-raised,
  #btn-switch-cm.md-button,
  #btn-switch-cm.md-button.md-raised,
  .nr-dashboard-theme #btn-switch-hcm.md-button,
  .nr-dashboard-theme #btn-switch-hcm.md-button.md-raised,
  .nr-dashboard-theme #btn-switch-cm.md-button,
  .nr-dashboard-theme #btn-switch-cm.md-button.md-raised {
    min-height: 30px !important;
    height: 30px !important;
    padding: 0 12px !important;
    min-width: unset !important;
    border-radius: 999px !important;

    background: #0E1216 !important;
    color: #6FE39A !important;
    border: 2px solid #2E7D32 !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;

    font-size: 12px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: .1px !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
    transform: none !important;
  }

  #btn-switch-hcm .md-button-content,
  #btn-switch-cm .md-button-content {
    font-size: 12px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
  }

  #btn-switch-hcm:hover,
  #btn-switch-hcm:focus,
  #btn-switch-cm:hover,
  #btn-switch-cm:focus {
    background: rgba(46, 125, 50, .10) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(46, 125, 50, .30) !important;
    border-color: #79D2A6 !important;
  }
</style>

<!-- Ví dụ nút chuyển trạm -->
<md-button id="btn-switch-cm" class="md-raised" ng-click="send({topic:'nav', payload:'tram2'})">
  CHUYỂN QUA TRẠM CÀ MAU
</md-button>
<md-button id="btn-switch-hcm" class="md-raised" ng-click="send({topic:'nav', payload:'tram1'})">
  CHUYỂN QUA TRẠM HỒ CHÍ MINH
</md-button>

name: chuyển tab sang trạm 2
chuyển vể trạm một

format:
<!-- NỀN VIDEO: Pixabay MP4 -->
<script>
  (function(){
  // tạo nền nếu chưa có
  if (!document.getElementById('video-bg')) {
    var wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.id = 'video-bg';
    wrap.innerHTML = '<video id="bgVideo" playsinline muted autoplay loop crossorigin="anonymous"></video>';
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
  }

  // gán nguồn MP4 trực tiếp (Pixabay)
  var v = document.getElementById('bgVideo');
  v.src = "https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2025/01/12/252178_large.mp4";
  v.muted = true;
  v.addEventListener('canplay', ()=> v.play().catch(()=>{}));
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', ()=>{ if(!document.hidden) v.play().catch(()=>{}); });
})();
</script>

<style id="video-bg-style">
  /* Video phủ toàn màn hình, nằm DƯỚI UI, không chặn click */
  #video-bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: -1;
    pointer-events: none;
    overflow: hidden;
  }

  #video-bg video {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transform: translateZ(0);
    will-change: transform;
    filter: none !important;
    background: transparent !important;
  }

  /* Làm trong suốt các wrapper để thấy nền; KHÔNG đụng .md-card */
  html,
  body {
    background: transparent !important;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-theme,
  .nr-dashboard-theme md-content,
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-view,
  body>md-content,
  body>div.md-content {
    background: transparent !important;
  }
</style>

<!-- NỀN VIDEO: Pixabay MP4 -->
<script>
  (function(){
  // tạo nền nếu chưa có
  if (!document.getElementById('video-bg')) {
    var wrap = document.createElement('div');
    wrap.id = 'video-bg';
    wrap.innerHTML = '<video id="bgVideo" playsinline muted autoplay loop crossorigin="anonymous"></video>';
    document.body.appendChild(wrap);
  }

  // gán nguồn MP4 trực tiếp (Pixabay)
  var v = document.getElementById('bgVideo');
  v.src = "https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2022/11/08/138267-769141615_large.mp4";
  v.muted = true;
  v.addEventListener('canplay', ()=> v.play().catch(()=>{}));
  document.addEventListener('visibilitychange', ()=>{ if(!document.hidden) v.play().catch(()=>{}); });
})();
</script>

<style id="video-bg-style">
  /* Video phủ toàn màn hình, nằm DƯỚI UI, không chặn click */
  #video-bg {
    position: fixed;
    inset: 0;
    z-index: -1;

    overflow: hidden;
  }

  #video-bg video {
    position: absolute;
    inset: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    transform: translateZ(0);
    will-change: transform;
    filter: none !important;
    background: transparent !important;
  }

  /* Làm trong suốt các wrapper để thấy nền; KHÔNG đụng .md-card */
  html,
  body {
    background: transparent !important;
  }

  .nr-dashboard-theme,
  .nr-dashboard-theme md-content,
  .nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-view,
  body>md-content,
  body>div.md-content {
    background: transparent !important;
  }
</style>

format:
<style>
  /* NÚT CHUYỂN TRẠM HCM — ép nhỏ hơn START/STOP */
  /* Target cực cụ thể để thắng mọi CSS khác */
  #btn-switch-hcm.md-button,
  #btn-switch-hcm.md-button.md-raised,
  .nr-dashboard-theme #btn-switch-hcm.md-button,
  .nr-dashboard-theme #btn-switch-hcm.md-button.md-raised {
    /* kích thước gọn */
    min-height: 30px !important;   /* override mặc định của md-button */
    height: 30px !important;
    padding: 0 12px !important;
    min-width: unset !important;    /* auto theo nội dung */

    /* kiểu pill viền xanh, nền tối */
    background: #0E1216 !important;
    color: #6FE39A !important;
    border: 2px solid #2E7D32 !important;
    border-radius: 999px !important;
    box-shadow: none !important;

    /* chữ nhỏ hơn START/STOP (16px) */
    font-size: 12px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    letter-spacing: .1px !important;
    text-transform: none !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;

    /* đề phòng theme nào đó scale nút */
    transform: none !important;
  }
  /* Nếu theme bọc chữ trong .md-button-content thì ép luôn */
  #btn-switch-hcm .md-button-content {
    font-size: 12px !important;
    font-weight: 700 !important;
    line-height: 1 !important;
  }
  /* Hover/focus */
  #btn-switch-hcm:hover,
  #btn-switch-hcm:focus {
    background: rgba(46,125,50,.10) !important;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(46,125,50,.30) !important;
    border-color: #79D2A6 !important;
  }
</style>

<!-- Nút chuyển qua trạm HCM: NHỎ HƠN START/STOP -->
<md-button id="btn-switch-hcm"
           class="md-raised"
           ng-click="send({topic:'nav', payload:'tram1'})">
  CHUYỂN QUA TRẠM HỒ CHÍ MINH
</md-button>
